title: Emailed Pulse Auto Assigned Owner
excerpt:
Hi All, 
Can we actually assigned the task straight away on the email when we send the task via Emailed Pulse instead of send it and assigned it manually on monday?

posts.author: esus (Erwin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Can we actually assigned the task straight away on the email when we send the task via Emailed Pulse instead of send it and assigned it manually on monday?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @esus,

Good question—thanks for posting in the community about this!

You might think about using “item default values” to assign a person automatically if it will always be the same person:

image1245×584 51.5 KB

Would this do the trick? Or were you looking to assign a different person every time?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Just one thing to be aware of… default values will supersede automation assignments. So you may not want to use them if you later plan to use automations for assigning team members.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
